record.description: Slightly looser stop to reduce fold whipsaw while keeping the longer hold.
notes: The frozen winner is stop_5_target_15 and should not be retuned on the same 2022-01-01 through 2026-03-31 tape.
The frozen confirmation preset intentionally uses the six-name optimized sleeve: AAPL, AVGO, COST, LLY, META, NVDA.
Benchmark SPY return over the test span: 80.45%
Benchmark rationale: SPY remains the correct market baseline for a broad long-only momentum sleeve that rotates among liquid large-cap equities.
Exposure profile: 81.69% of evaluated trading days active, 34.52% average capital deployed, 82.17% peak capital deployed.
Risk-adjusted summary: annualized return 22.63%, annualized volatility 10.88%, Sharpe 1.93, Sortino 3.17, Calmar 2.55.
The strategy cleared the minimum thresholds for profit factor, expectancy, fold consistency, drawdown, benchmark comparison, and sample-quality gates.
legacy manual exception: operator-confirmed promotion for pre-current-gates regime-aware momentum record so passport v2/paper-monitoring can reflect the existing approved stock slot

gates.label: Minimum trade count
gates.summary: Completed-trade floor required before a decisive verdict is allowed.

gates.label: Profit factor
gates.summary: Gross-profit-to-gross-loss ratio for the full chained run.

gates.label: Expectancy per trade
gates.summary: Average PnL per trade across the full chained run.

gates.label: Profitable folds
gates.summary: Percent of folds that closed positive.

gates.label: Max drawdown bound
gates.summary: Maximum chained drawdown allowed for a promotable edge.

gates.label: Beats benchmark
gates.summary: Strategy return cleared the configured benchmark comparison mode.

gates.label: Expectancy decay
gates.summary: Second-half expectancy stayed within the allowed decay envelope.

gates.label: Held-out window
gates.summary: The held-out window confirmed positive return and expectancy.
